# Bug Fix Workflowreproduce -> diagnose -> fix -> verifyUse this workflow when fixing a bug, error, or unexpected behavior.---## Phase 1: REPRODUCEGoal: understand and reproduce the bug.### Steps1. Ask user to describe the bug2. Reproduce the bug locally3. Document current (broken) behavior---## Phase 2: DIAGNOSEGoal: find the root cause.### Steps1. Check error logs2. Check browser console3. Find the responsible code---## Phase 3: FIXGoal: fix the bug with minimal changes.### Rules- Fix only the specific bug- Do not refactor along the way- Commit with descriptive message---## Phase 4: VERIFYGoal: ensure the fix works.### Steps1. Bug is fixed2. Nothing else is broken3. Lint and build pass---Built with: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
